KeysToEntries.NightVision_Anpvs14NightVisionMonocular_: The AN/PVS-14 is a versatile monocular night vision device that has been in service with the U.S. military and NATO forces since 2000. It provides high-quality image intensification in low-light or no-light conditions.  Utilizing a single-image intensifier tube, it offers a lightweight and energy-efficient solution while maintaining compatibility with a wide range of optical and helmet-mounted systems.
KeysToEntries.NightVision_Anpvs7_Description: The AN/PVS-7 is a single-tube night vision biocular system, which means that although it features two eyepieces, the image is generated from a single tube, giving the user depth perception with reduced weight and complexity. Developed in 1982 and fielded in 1988, the AN/PVS-7, despite its age, remains commonly used by the United States Armed Forces, as well as several other militaries worldwide.
KeysToEntries.NightVision_Anpvs31aNightVisionBinocular: The AN/PVS-31A is a modern, lightweight, dual-tube night vision goggle (NVG) system used by the U.S. military and NATO forces. It features advanced autogated white phosphor night vision technology, offering enhanced depth perception and situational awareness compared to monocular systems like the AN/PVS-14. The dual-tube design allows each eye to have its own image intensification tube, providing a more natural and immersive field of view.
KeysToEntries.Mount_RhinoNvgMount_Description: The Rhino mount, which gets its name from its distinctive shape when folded on the helmet, allows the user to attach a night vision device to their headgear. It uses a bayonet mount.
KeysToEntries.Mount_Pvs14Arm_Description: An essential piece of equipment for mounting PVS-14 type devices to a helmet, it screws onto the NVG device and attaches via a dovetail mount.
KeysToEntries.Mount_L4G24HelmetNvgMount_Description: A widely used mounting solution that allows the user to attach night vision goggles (NVGs) to their helmet via a dovetail mount.
KeysToEntries.NightVision_NgsPvs14NightVisionMonocular: Updated version of the AN/PVS-14 monocular made with lighter components. It offers the advantages of clasical PVS-14 with added benefits such as lighter weight and higher FOM intensifier tube.
KeysToEntries.Mount_Rhino_HelmetNVGMount_Description: The Rhino mount, named for its distinctive shape when flipped up, allows the user to attach a night vision device to their helmet using a bayonet mount.
KeysToEntries.NightVision_DT2_Multicam_Name: DT-2 NGS Edition Night Vision Device (Multicam)
KeysToEntries.NightVision_DT2_Multicam_Description: The DT-2 was designed by the original designer of the DTNVG. An upgrade to the original design, the DT-2 is a lightweight yet robust device with high-quality internal components. Assembled and wrapped by Night Gear Solutions in Slovakia, this special edition offers additional protection against scratches and mechanical damage.
KeysToEntries.NightVision_DT2_BlackMulticam_Name: DT-2 NGS Edition Night Vision Device (Multicam Black)
KeysToEntries.NightVision_DT2_BlackMulticam_Descriptio: The DT-2 was designed by the original designer of the DTNVG. An upgrade to the original design, the DT-2 is a lightweight yet robust device with high-quality internal components. Assembled and wrapped by Night Gear Solutions in Slovakia, this special edition offers additional protection against scratches and mechanical damage.
